pages.text: Mfubu, the hippo, lives in his huge pool of water. I love wallowing and diving! H S O L P S H S L I S P
But now there is a big problem. The water is so dirty, I can’t see. Look at all this scum!
I feel sad. I need my friends to help me find the problem. H S O L P I S L S P K! C U Y H S
First he finds Hoppy Heron. She is sad too. The water is so smelly! The fish are dying! I have nothing to eat!
P O H F L A P! W E Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem. S P L I! S K O L H P S H S C U Y
They meet Jambo, the elephant. He is looking miserable. The water tastes so horrible, I can’t drink it.
Let’s go up the river to see if we can find the problem. T R P O U H S P R A Y P S F L S! A P K! C I P L W I S H P S! E K C Y U O L S H
When they get near where the people live, It’s the people polluting the river. they stop and stare.! K UC Y
Hello! Why do you look so sad? Your stinky mess is making our river dirty! It makes us sick.
We’re so sorry! We must get help to fix this.! K A A A W K
It’s getting late... and the animals are tired. And now we can go home. The pipe is fixed and the litter is gone. P L I! S SL P S P P HF U L OA R P! T S H S O S H PR A Y!
Guess what? The pool is already cleaner. Guess what? The water already smells better. Guess what? The water already tastes cleaner. It’s been a good day.
